query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "socrates: towards reliable automated evaluation of proactive llm media" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on the methodology of generating complex instruction data to improve LLM instruction-following capabilities, which does not address the user's specific question regarding the "SoCRATES" framework for the automated evaluation of proactive LLM media.
